name: Feishu Skills for OpenClaw
description: Enhances the official Feishu OpenClaw plugin with natural language intent routing, user-friendly interactions (like @mention parsing), and advanced capabilities not yet covered by the official plugin (e.g., interactive card sending). It acts as a driving manual and turbocharger for the official Feishu plugin, helping agents know when and how to use existing tools, optimizing anti-human interactions, and directly complementing missing advanced features like sending message cards with built-in design guidance. It provides send-message, send-card, and send-image skills.
review: Approved by Gamora. All checks passed.
